selected_on: robust judgement (val skill + test skill + calibration), NOT naive val-sort
name: dropout0.3
note: The sweep's naive val-winner was 'wd3e-4' (val +9.5% but test only +14.1% — it traded summer for winter, a single-seed artefact). 'dropout0.3' is the adopted recipe because it beats the base on ALL THREE: val skill, test skill, and calibration. Chosen 2026-07-20.

vs_base.verdict: dropout 0.3 improves winter skill, summer skill, and calibration; main win is calibration (coverage 0.63 -> 0.74). Small but robust.

how_to_apply: Already the default in train_gnn.py / train_ensemble.py (--dropout 0.3). Retrain the ensemble with the usual command to bake it in.
